title: Campsite
description: This mod adds a brand-new Campsite to the Plains, Taiga and Dark Forest biome.
body:
Campsite Structure

This mod adds a brand-new Campsite to the Plains, Taiga and Dark Forest biome.

![Campsite Front View](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8c739f6f45a89b52c7cf46c4a522fc8d598eae8.jpeg)
![Campsite View From Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37f313fa03ae65f5d79b46341703e70b00472ae0.jpeg)
Campsite:

A cosy outdoor spot perfect for adventurers.
Complete with a campfire, tents, and supplies for your journey.
You are free to include this mod in your modpacks
